selectedOpportunity.name: PatchProof
selectedOpportunity.summary: A browser-only tool that turns a task, unified diff, check logs, and optional artifacts into a claim-to-evidence completion receipt.

rejectedAlternatives.name: Repo Contract Doctor
rejectedAlternatives.reason: credible pain but weak whitespace against multiple current tools

rejectedAlternatives.name: ExampleLens
rejectedAlternatives.reason: narrower audience and established validation alternatives

rejectedAlternatives.name: RunnerGap
rejectedAlternatives.reason: high honest implementation cost and mature local execution/linting incumbents

facts: The cited Stack Overflow survey reports material trust and debugging friction among respondents using AI tools.
GitHub status checks and agent-session logs expose parts of the evidence workflow.
Multiple current products already address agent action records or receipts.
hypotheses: Developers will value a lightweight manual receipt builder across agents.
A browser-only local workflow will be easier than reviewing raw logs.
Portable Markdown and JSON receipts will fit existing review habits.

interpretation: Pursue authorizes only a separately approved narrow build-and-test stage. It is not evidence of product-market fit or launch readiness.
